_rationale: C++ /status emits an `indexing_progress` block (phase/files_scanned/files_total/percent_complete/elapsed_ms) describing live indexing state. Go's /status does not include this object. Locked C++-side by ServerTest.IndexingProgressFieldTypesAndRanges, IndexingProgressPhaseIsKnownEnumValue, IndexingProgressInvariantScannedLeqTotal. Intentional enrichment.

tiers._rationale_ignore: BASE_IGNORE_NON_DETERMINISM applies implicitly (pid/timestamp/elapsed_ms/version/jsonrpc envelope etc.); this list captures the descriptor-specific drift beyond the universal baseline.
